name: Thai Vegetable Oil Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Vegetable Oil Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes soy meal and soybean oil primarily in Thailand. It provides soybean oil for household cooking purposes, as well as corn, sunflower, and canola oils under the A-NGOON brand; soybean meal for the production of animal feed under the TVO Hipro√Ç¬ñMeal brand; and vegetable oils under the Healthy Chef and Queen brands. The company also offers olive oils under the MONINI brand; dehulled soymeal under the TVO Dehulled Soymeal brand; full fat soy under the TVO Full Fat Soy brand; dehulled full fat soy under the TVO Dehulled Full Fat Soy brand; TVO soy hull and lecithin products; TVO crude degummed soybean oil; and fish canned products. In addition, it manufactures and distributes packaging products; and distributes consumer products. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
